html:
{%- set company_logo = frappe.db.get_value("Company", doc.company, "company_logo") -%} {%- set sl = frappe.db.get_value("Shipping List", doc.custom_shipping_list, ["vessel", "no_voyage", "origin_location", "destination_location", "etd"], as_dict=True) if doc.custom_shipping_list else None -%} {%- set pol = frappe.db.get_value("Location", sl.origin_location, "title") if sl and sl.origin_location else None -%} {%- set pod = frappe.db.get_value("Location", sl.destination_location, "title") if sl and sl.destination_location else None -%} {%- set _banks = frappe.get_all("Bank", fields=["bank_name", "custom_account_name", "custom_bank_branch", "custom_account_number", "swift_number"], order_by="custom_default_bank desc, modified desc", limit_page_length=1) -%} {%- set bank = _banks[0] if _banks else None -%} {%- set swift = bank.swift_number if bank else None -%} {%- set bank_name = bank.bank_name if bank else None -%} {#- Alamat customer: pakai address_display invoice; kalau kosong (mis. data legacy), ambil alamat master Customer (utamakan is_primary_address). -#} {%- set addr_html = doc.address_display -%} {%- if not addr_html and doc.customer -%} {%- set addr_names = frappe.get_all("Dynamic Link", filters={"link_doctype": "Customer", "link_name": doc.customer, "parenttype": "Address"}, pluck="parent") -%} {%- if addr_names -%} {%- set adoc = frappe.get_all("Address", filters={"name": ["in", addr_names]}, fields=["address_line1", "address_line2", "city", "state", "pincode", "country"], order_by="is_primary_address desc, creation asc", limit=1)[0] -%} {%- set addr_parts = [adoc.address_line1, adoc.address_line2, ((adoc.city or "") + ((" " + adoc.pincode) if adoc.pincode else "")) or None, adoc.state, adoc.country] -%} {%- set addr_html = addr_parts | select | join("
") -%} {%- endif -%} {%- endif -%} {%- set npwp = doc.tax_id or frappe.db.get_value("Customer", doc.customer, "tax_id") -%} {%- set cur = doc.currency or "IDR" -%} {%- set print_cur = print_settings.print_as_currency or doc.custom_print_as_currency or cur -%} {%- set as_idr = print_cur == "IDR" -%} {#- Semua field custom_* (discount/pph/tax/materai/adjustment) dan doc.total/grand_total DISIMPAN dalam mata uang HEADER (lihat overrides/sales_invoice.py validate). Untuk mencetak dalam mata uang lain, SEMUANYA dikali `scale` yang sama -- jangan campur sebagian base_* (sudah IDR) dengan sebagian custom_* (masih mata uang header). -#} {%- set scale = 1 if print_cur == cur else (doc.conversion_rate or 1) -%} {%- set containers = doc.custom_containers or [] -%} {#- Watermark PAID: dikendalikan checkbox di sidebar print view. `cmi_watermark` HANYA dikirim kalau sidebar itu ada (lihat public/js/print_view.js); di render tanpa sidebar (PDF/email/background job) key-nya tidak ada -> pakai nilai tersimpan di dokumen. Checkbox-nya sendiri baru muncul kalau invoice sudah Customer Paid. -#} {%- set _wm = print_settings.get("cmi_watermark") if print_settings else None -%} {%- set show_watermark = (_wm == "1") or (_wm is none and doc.custom_watermark_paid) -%}
{% if show_watermark %}
{% if company_logo %}{% endif %}PAID
{% endif %}
{% if company_logo %}{% else %}{{ frappe.db.get_value("Company", doc.company, "company_name") or doc.company }}{% endif %}
{{ print_settings.invoice_title or doc.custom_invoice_title or "INVOICE" }}
Invoice To:

{% endif %} {{ addr_html or "" }}
Invoice No:{{ doc.name }}
Invoice Date:{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.invoice_date or doc.posting_date, "dd MMM yyyy") }}
Due Date:{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.due_date or doc.term_of_payment, "dd MMM yyyy") if (doc.due_date or doc.term_of_payment) else "-" }}
Delivery Term:{{ doc.custom_delivery_term or doc.incoterm or "-" }}
Payment Term:{{ doc.custom_payment_term or doc.payment_terms_template or "-" }}
{#- Baris tagihan mengikuti Invoice Type: Reimburse -> custom_reimburse_items (per Expense Class) Debit Note + Manual -> custom_dn_items (isian bebas) selain itu -> items (produk/jasa dari master) -#} {#- ROBUST: tentukan blok dari tabel yang BERISI data, bukan dari nama/behavior tipe. custom_invoice_behavior bisa kosong di invoice lama (belum ter-backfill) -> kalau hanya mengandalkan itu, tabel reimburse/DN jadi kosong saat print. -#} {%- set is_reimburse = (doc.custom_reimburse_items | length) > 0 or doc.custom_invoice_behavior == "Reimburse" -%} {%- set is_dn_manual = (not is_reimburse) and ( (doc.custom_dn_items | length) > 0 or (doc.custom_invoice_behavior == "Debit Note" and doc.custom_dn_input_mode == "Manual")) -%} {% if is_reimburse %} {#- Kolom SAMA persis dengan tabel item biasa. Tiap baris = satu Expense Class: Qty 1 "Doc", Price = Amount, Ext. Value = Qty x Price = Amount, Net Amount = Net Total (Amount + Tax); base pakai line_amount (net_total x rate). -#} {% for r in doc.custom_reimburse_items %} {% endfor %}
Description of Charges Qty UOM Price Ext. Value Currency Exc. Rate Net Amount ({{ print_cur }})
{{ r.alias or r.expense_class or r.expense_note or "" }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(1) }} Doc {{ "{:,.2f}".format(r.amount or 0) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(r.amount or 0) }} {{ cur }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(doc.conversion_rate or 1) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format((r.line_amount if as_idr else r.net_total) or 0) }}
{% elif is_dn_manual %} {% for r in doc.custom_dn_items %} {% endfor %}
Description of Charges Qty Price Amount ({{ print_cur }})
{{ r.description or "" }} {% if r.notes %} - {{ r.notes }}{% endif %} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(r.qty or 0) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(r.price or 0) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(r.amount or 0) }}
{% else %} {% for it in doc.items %} {% endfor %}
Description of Charges Qty UOM Price Ext. Value Currency Exc. Rate Net Amount ({{ print_cur }})
{{ it.item_name or it.item_code }} {% if it.description and it.description != it.item_name %} - {{ it.description }}{% endif %} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(it.qty or 0) }} {{ it.uom or "" }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format((it.custom_item_price or it.rate) or 0) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format(((it.custom_item_price or it.rate) or 0) * (it.qty or 0)) }} {{ it.custom_currency or cur }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format((it.custom_exchange_rate or 1) * scale) }} {{ "{:,.2f}".format((it.amount or 0) * scale) }}
{% endif %}
Total{{ "{:,.2f}".format((doc.custom_amount_total or doc.total or 0) * scale) }}

{#- Printed By: pilihan sidebar > nilai tersimpan di dokumen > baris Default di Selling Settings > Printed By (lihat erpnext_custom/printed_by.py). Baris Default perlu dibaca di sini juga karena render tanpa sidebar (PDF/email) tidak pernah mengirim print_settings.printed_by. -#} {%- set _dflt = frappe.get_all("CMI Printed By", filters={"parenttype": "Selling Settings", "is_default": 1, "disabled": 0}, pluck="label", limit_page_length=1) -%} {%- set signer = print_settings.printed_by or doc.custom_printed_by or (_dflt[0] if _dflt else None) -%} {#- Invoice LAMA menyimpan user id (field ini dulunya Link User) -> terjemahkan ke full name. Nilai baru adalah teks bebas, jadi lookup-nya gagal dan dipakai apa adanya. -#} {%- set signer_text = (frappe.db.get_value("User", signer, "full_name") or signer) if signer else None -%} {% if signer_text %} {#- Keterangan panjang (mis. "COMPUTER GENERATED DOCUMENT...") tidak muat di ukuran tanda tangan; kecilkan supaya tetap satu baris. -#} 40 %} style="font-size:12px;"{% endif %}>{{ signer_text }} {% endif %}
